briefdescription.para: Recalculate the Inter trial interval (ITI) for the given device.
Calculate the total number of sweeps for repeated acquisition.

detaileddescription.para: Helper function for plain calculation without lead and follower logic

briefdescription.para: Calculate the total number of sweeps for repeated acquisition.
Function gets called after the first sweep is already acquired and if repeated acquisition is on.
Return one if we are acquiring currently the very first sweep of a possible repeated acquisition cycle. Zero means that we acquire a later sweep than the first one in a repeated acquisition cycle.

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable skipCount, variable limitToSetBorder=defaultValue, variable document=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: RA_SkipSweeps

briefdescription.para: Allows skipping forward or backwards the sweep count during data acquistion.

parameterdescription.para: The number of sweeps to skip (forward or backwards) during repeated acquisition
[optional, defaults to false] Limits skipCount so that we don't skip further than after the last sweep of the stimset with the most number of sweeps.
[optional, defaults to false] Add labnotebook entries to document the sweep skipping.

briefdescription.para: Document the number of skipped sweeps.
Returns valid count after adding skipCount.

parameterdescription.para: The number of sweeps to skip (forward or backwards) during repeated acquisition.

briefdescription.para: Continue DAQ if requested or stop it.
comment in to enable repeated acquisition performance measurement code
